tasks.fmt:check: deno fmt --check server.ts server_test.ts deno.json README.md docs/chat-specification.md docs/chat-acceptance-checklist.md chat/*.ts chat/client.js
tasks.lint: deno lint server.ts server_test.ts chat/*.ts chat/client.js
tasks.check: deno check --unstable-kv server.ts server_test.ts chat/data.ts chat/data_test.ts chat/auth.ts chat/auth_test.ts chat/session.ts chat/session_test.ts chat/rooms.ts chat/rooms_test.ts chat/join_requests.ts chat/join_requests_test.ts chat/messages.ts chat/messages_test.ts chat/events.ts chat/events_test.ts chat/notifications.ts chat/notifications_test.ts chat/integration_test.ts chat/client.js
tasks.test: deno test --allow-read --unstable-kv server_test.ts chat/data_test.ts chat/auth_test.ts chat/session_test.ts chat/rooms_test.ts chat/join_requests_test.ts chat/messages_test.ts chat/events_test.ts chat/notifications_test.ts chat/integration_test.ts
